sentences.target: Ich brauche das Zertifikat für die Bewerbung.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə das tsɛʁtifiˈkaːt fyːɐ diː bəˈvɛʁbʊŋ/

translations.de: Ich brauche das Zertifikat für die Bewerbung.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə das tsɛʁtifiˈkaːt fyːɐ diː bəˈvɛʁbʊŋ/
translations.en: I need the certificate for the application.
translations.es: Necesito el certificado para la solicitud de empleo.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin du certificat pour ma candidature.
translations.it: Mi serve il certificato per la domanda di lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 申请工作需要这个证书。
translations.yue: 申請工作需要呢份證書。
translations.ru: Для заявки на работу мне нужен сертификат.
translations.pt: Preciso do certificado para a candidatura a emprego.
translations.he: אני צריך את התעודה להגשת מועמדות למשרה.
translations.tr: İş başvurusu için sertifikaya ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần chứng chỉ cho hồ sơ xin việc.
translations.nl: Ik heb het certificaat nodig voor de sollicitatie.
translations.uk: Мені потрібен сертифікат для подання заявки на роботу.
translations.hu: Szükségem van a bizonyítványra az álláspályázathoz.
translations.hi: नौकरी के आवेदन के लिए मुझे प्रमाणपत्र चाहिए.
translations.pl: Potrzebuję certyfikatu do aplikacji o pracę.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι το πιστοποιητικό για την αίτηση εργασίας.
translations.id: Saya membutuhkan sertifikat untuk lamaran kerja.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de certificat pentru dosarul de angajare.
translations.cs: Potřebuji certifikát k žádosti o zaměstnání.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for certifikatet til jobansøgningen.
translations.ja: 応募に証明書が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate meaning 'to need'.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Zertifikat'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a purpose phrase.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Bewerbung'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Du hast das Zertifikat schon ausgedruckt.

translations.de: Du hast das Zertifikat schon ausgedruckt.
translations.en: You have already printed the certificate.
translations.fr: Tu as déjà imprimé le certificat.
translations.vi: Bạn đã in chứng chỉ rồi.
translations.nl: Je hebt het certificaat al geprint.
translations.hi: तुमने प्रमाणपत्र पहले ही प्रिंट कर लिया है.
translations.nb: Du har allerede skrevet ut sertifikatet.
translations.sv: Du har redan skrivit ut certifikatet.
translations.ja: もう証明書を印刷しました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms perfect with the past participle.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Zertifikat'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of the verb complex ('hast' + 'ausgedruckt').
Adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating prior completion.
Past participle of the separable verb 'ausdrucken'; main lexical verb in perfect, governs the accusative object 'das Zertifikat'.

sentences.target: Sie zeigt ihrer Trainerin das Zertifikat.

translations.de: Sie zeigt ihrer Trainerin das Zertifikat.
translations.en: She shows the certificate to her trainer.
translations.es: Ella le muestra el certificado a su entrenadora.
translations.fr: Elle montre le certificat à sa coach.
translations.it: Lei mostra il certificato alla sua allenatrice.
translations.zh-Hans: 她把证书给她的教练看。
translations.yue: 佢攞證書畀佢嘅教練睇。
translations.pt: Ela mostra o certificado à sua treinadora.
translations.he: היא מראה את התעודה למאמנת שלה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đưa chứng chỉ cho huấn luyện viên của mình xem.
translations.nl: Ze laat het certificaat aan haar trainster zien.
translations.hi: वह अपनी प्रशिक्षिका को प्रमाणपत्र दिखाती है.
translations.el: Δείχνει το πιστοποιητικό στην προπονήτριά της.
translations.nb: Hun viser sertifikatet til treneren sin.
translations.id: Dia menunjukkan sertifikat kepada pelatih perempuannya.
translations.sv: Hon visar certifikatet för sin tränare.
translations.ro: Ea îi arată certificatul antrenoarei ei.
translations.da: Hun viser certifikatet til sin træner.
translations.ja: 彼女は証明書をトレーナーに見せる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; ditransitive verb 'to show'.
Possessive determiner, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Trainerin' within the indirect-object NP.
Feminine noun, dative singular; indirect object (recipient) of 'zeigt'.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Zertifikat'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'zeigt'.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder wartet auf sein Zertifikat.

translations.de: Mein Bruder wartet auf sein Zertifikat.
translations.en: My brother is waiting for his certificate.
translations.es: Mi hermano está esperando su certificado.
translations.it: Mio fratello sta aspettando il suo certificato.
translations.pt: Meu irmão está esperando o certificado dele.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi đang đợi chứng chỉ của mình.
translations.nl: Mijn broer wacht op zijn certificaat.
translations.uk: Мій брат чекає на свій сертифікат.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई अपने प्रमाणपत्र का इंतजार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój brat czeka na swój certyfikat.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου περιμένει το πιστοποιητικό του.
translations.nb: Min bror venter på sertifikatet sitt.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya sedang menunggu sertifikatnya.
translations.sv: Min bror väntar på sitt certifikat.
translations.cs: Můj bratr čeká na svůj certifikát.
translations.da: Min bror venter på sit certifikat.
translations.ja: 弟は証明書を待っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative masculine singular; agrees with 'Bruder'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of 'wartet'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a prepositional complement with 'auf'.
Preposition; in 'warten auf' it selects accusative for its complement.
Possessive determiner, accusative neuter singular; agrees with 'Zertifikat'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf' (complement to 'wartet').
